tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose control or prediabetes. Creatinine is slightly elevated, suggesting possible reduced kidney function. Chloride is marginally high but likely not clinically significant. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for kidney function and glycemic status, and consider follow-up testing.

text.div: Provider Organization: Facharzt für Allgemeinmedizin Johann Holbach
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
